name: calendar-interactions
title: Calendar Interactions
description: Optional context menu and confirmation dialog primitives for event actions and guarded schedule changes.
docs: Install with `npx shadcn@latest add https://calendarcn.phantomtechind.com/r/calendar-core.json https://calendarcn.phantomtechind.com/r/calendar-interactions.json` and import the add-ons from `@/components/calendar/addons/interactions/*`.
